disclaimer: Yeh data manually verified hai. Apply karne se pehle official site zaroor check karein.

category_relaxations.note: Sirf Rajasthan domicile wale candidates ko reserved category benefits milte hain

age_relaxation.other_state_candidates: General category mein treat honge — koi reservation nahi

documents_required_always: SSO ID (mandatory for all Rajasthan govt forms)
Scanned signature (black pen on white paper)
computer_qualifications_accepted: RS-CIT (Rajasthan State Certificate in IT) — Vardhman Mahaveer Open University, Kota
Any graduate degree with Computer as a subject

steps.title: Website kholna
steps.common_mistake: Galat website — sirf official URL use karo
steps.tip: Bookmark kar lo — baar baar kaam aayega

steps.title: Registration shuru karna
steps.action: 'Register' button pe click karo (Blue button, top right)
options: Bhamashah/Jan Aadhaar se register (Rajasthan residents ke liye best)
Facebook/Google se register (recommended nahi — govt work ke liye)
steps.recommended: Jan Aadhaar ya Aadhaar se karo — category benefits automatically link hote hain

steps.title: Jan Aadhaar ID daalna
steps.common_mistake: Jan Aadhaar family number hai — apna individual number daalo
steps.tip: Jan Aadhaar card ghar mein hoga — pehle dhundh lo

steps.title: OTP verify karna
steps.action: Mobile pe aaya OTP daalo (5 minute mein expire hota hai)
steps.common_mistake: OTP expire ho gaya — 'Resend OTP' use karo
steps.tip: Mobile haath mein rakho — OTP turant aata hai

steps.title: Password banana
rules: Example: Raj@2026 (ye mat use karo — apna banao)
steps.common_mistake: Password bhool jaate hain — kisi safe jagah likh lo
steps.tip: SSO ID aur password alag kagaz pe likh ke ghar mein rakhna

steps.title: Profile complete karna
steps.action: Naam, DOB, address sahi fill karo
steps.important: Naam EXACTLY waise likhna jaise 10th certificate mein hai
steps.common_mistake: Nickname ya short name likhna — baad mein document mismatch hoti hai
steps.tip: Ek baar fill karo, dobara nahi bharna padega

steps.title: SSO ID note karna
steps.action: Dashboard pe aaya SSO ID (username) note karo
steps.format: Usually mobile number ya custom username hota hai
steps.common_mistake: SSO ID bhool jaana — password reset tough ho jaata hai
steps.tip: SSO ID + password = government ka digital passport. Sambhal ke rakho.

exams.name: RPSC RAS (Rajasthan Administrative Service) 2026

eligibility.domicile: Rajasthan preferred (other states apply as General)
eligibility.education_note: Final year students bhi apply kar sakte hain Prelims ke liye — Mains se pehle degree chahiye
eligibility.attempt_limit: Koi limit nahi — age limit tak baar baar try kar sakte ho
eligibility.rajasthan_hindi: Devanagari script mein Hindi ka basic knowledge mandatory

age_relaxation.widow_divorced_female: 21 saal se — koi upper limit nahi

selection_process: Interview mein personality test hota hai
subjects: General Studies (History, Geography, Polity, Economy, Science)

free_youtube.best_for: Rajasthan History, Geography — Subhash Charan Sir
RPSC all grades — Special Rajasthan GK

exams.disclaimer: 500+ vacancies expected — official notification ka wait karo

exams.name: RSMSSB Patwari Recruitment 2026
exams.board_full: Rajasthan Subordinate and Ministerial Services Selection Board

eligibility.CET: CET Graduate Level qualify karna mandatory
eligibility.CET_note: CET nahi hai toh form bharna bekar hai — pehle CET dena hoga

age_relaxation.other_state_candidates: General category only, koi relaxation nahi

step_by_step_form_guide: Step 1: SSO ID pe login karo (sso.rajasthan.gov.in)
Step 4: OTR (One Time Registration) fill karo — pehli baar only
Step 5: Personal details fill karo (EXACTLY 10th certificate ke anusaar)
Step 7: Category select karo + certificate upload karo
Step 8: Photo upload (JPEG, max 50KB, white background)
Step 10: Exam centre preference chuno (3 options doge)
Step 11: Fee pay karo (Debit Card / Net Banking / UPI)
Step 13: Confirmation page PRINT/SCREENSHOT karo — ZAROOR
common_mistakes: Naam 10th certificate se alag likhna → Form reject
Category galat select karna → Fee waste
Photo size limit cross karna → Upload error
Last date ka wait karna → Server crash — pehle bharo
CET number bina form bharna → Invalid application
Exam centre preference soch ke nahi chunnna → Door centre milta hai

free_youtube.best_for: Revenue laws, Rajasthan GK for Patwari

exams.disclaimer: CET Graduate Level qualify karna MANDATORY hai. Bina CET ke apply invalid hai.

exams.name: RSMSSB LDC / Junior Assistant 2026
exams.prestige: ★★★☆☆ (Clerk post — stable govt job, good for 12th pass)

eligibility.computer: RS-CIT / O Level / COPA / equivalent mandatory
eligibility.CET: CET Senior Secondary Level-2024 qualify karna MANDATORY
eligibility.CET_note: 12th ke baad CET Senior Secondary dena hoga — Graduate CET nahi chalega
eligibility.typing_speed: 25 wpm English / 20 wpm Hindi (some posts mein)

exams.disclaimer: Notification aane ka wait karo. CET Senior Secondary Level qualify karna mandatory hai.

exams.name: Rajasthan Police Constable Recruitment 2026

eligibility.max_age_note: Upper age bahut kam hai — 23 saal. Reserved categories ko relaxation milta hai.

physical.physical_test: Running, long jump, shot put required

age_relaxation.note: Exact relaxation official notification mein dekho — slightly vary karta hai

fee.note: Police recruitment fee alag hoti hai — confirm karo notification se

physical_preparation_tips: Running ke liye abhi se practice shuru karo
Physical test fail = selection nahi — seriously lo
exams.disclaimer: Age limit bahut strict hai (max 23 for General). Physical fitness equally important hai.

exams.name: BSTC (Pre D.El.Ed) Entrance Exam 2026
exams.note: BSTC SSO se nahi hota — separate portal hai
exams.prestige: ★★★☆☆ (Teacher banne ka pehla kadam — 2 saal D.El.Ed course)

eligibility.subjects: 12th mein koi bhi stream — Arts/Science/Commerce sab chalega

age_relaxation.note: Age calculation cutoff date pe hoti hai

fee.note: Direct payment on BSTC portal — SSO se nahi

subjects: Language Ability (Hindi ya English — student choose karta hai)
career_path: BSTC → D.El.Ed (2 year course) → Primary Teacher (1st-5th class)
Primary Teacher ka salary: ₹23,700+ per month
REET Level 1 bhi qualify karna hoga teaching ke liye

free_youtube.best_for: Teaching aptitude + Rajasthan GK for BSTC

exams.disclaimer: BSTC alag portal se hota hai — SSO ID yahaan kaam nahi aata. Official site check karo.
